title: Arrest made in Mossel Bay flat murder case
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 39-year-old man has been arrested in connection with the murder of a woman (62) in her Ocean View flat in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 39-year-old man has been arrested in connection with the murder of a woman (62) in her Ocean View flat in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Police, led by Lieutenant Colonel Ashley Michaels, arrested the suspect less than 48 hours after her body was found with a wound to the neck.","html":"Mossel Bay Police, led by Lieutenant Colonel Ashley Michaels, arrested the suspect less than 48 hours after her body was found with a wound to the neck."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies says the suspect was arrested in KwaNonqaba last night."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Though the victim's identity is known to Mossel Bay Advertiser, it will not be made public until the family members have arrived in Mossel Bay.","html":"Though the victim's identity is known to Mossel Bay Advertiser, it will not be made public until the family members have arrived in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The suspect remains in custody and is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court once charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He faces charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle. More charges might be added to the charge sheet.","html":"He faces charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle. More charges might be added to the charge sheet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The investigating officer is Warrant Officer Francois Pick.","html":"The investigating officer is Warrant Officer Francois Pick."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Woman found murdered in Mossel Bay flat","Vermoorde vrou se liggaam gevind nadat vriend haar as vermis aanmeld"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Arrest made in Mossel Bay flat murder case
